site.name: Mero Restaurant
site.description: Experience the rich flavors of Nepal at Mero Restaurant. Traditional recipes, fresh ingredients, warm hospitality.
hero.title: Taste of Nepal
hero.subtitle: in Every Bite
hero.description: From the valleys of Surkhet to your plate — authentic Nepali flavors crafted with love, tradition, and the freshest local ingredients.
features.title: Why Mero Restaurant?
features.authentic.title: Authentic Recipes
features.authentic.desc: Recipes passed down through generations, staying true to Nepal's culinary heritage.
features.fresh.title: Farm Fresh
features.fresh.desc: Locally sourced ingredients from Surkhet's fertile valleys, delivered fresh daily.
features.app.title: Order with App
features.app.desc: Skip the wait — browse, order, and pay right from your phone with our mobile app.
features.wifi.title: Free WiFi
features.wifi.desc: Stay connected while you dine. Scan the QR code at your table to connect instantly.
menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Explore our carefully curated selection of Nepali favorites
info.title: Visit Us

download.subtitle: Order ahead, earn rewards, and never miss a special.

download.android.label: Get it on
about.title: Our Story
about.p1: Mero Restaurant was born from a simple dream — to bring the authentic flavors of Nepal to the heart of Surkhet. Founded by a family passionate about Nepali cuisine, we have been serving our community with love and dedication.
about.p2: Every dish tells a story of tradition, from our hand-ground spice blends to recipes that have been perfected over generations. We believe food is more than sustenance — it's connection, culture, and celebration.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.desc: To preserve and share the authentic tastes of Nepal, using locally sourced ingredients and time-honored cooking techniques, while creating a welcoming space for our community.
about.values.title: Our Values
wifi.title: Connect to WiFi
wifi.subtitle: Welcome to Mero Restaurant! Connect to our free WiFi.
wifi.enjoy: Enjoy your meal and free internet!

order.paymentNote: Payment will be collected at the restaurant
order.notFoundDesc: This order could not be found. It may still be processing.

order.thankYou: Thank you for dining at Mero Restaurant

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collect.title: Information We Collect
privacy.collect.desc: When you use Mero Restaurant's website or mobile application, we may collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email, phone number, and delivery address when placing orders.
privacy.use.title: How We Use Your Information
privacy.use.1: To process and fulfill your food orders
privacy.use.2: To send order confirmations and updates
privacy.use.3: To improve our services and menu offerings
privacy.use.4: To communicate special offers (with your consent)
privacy.storage.title: Data Storage
privacy.storage.desc: Your data is stored securely and we do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except as necessary to process your orders (e.g., payment processors).
privacy.wifi.title: WiFi Usage
privacy.wifi.desc: Our free WiFi service collects basic connection data for network management purposes only. We do not monitor or log your browsing activity.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.desc: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at
privacy.contact.suffix: or visit us at Birendranagar, Surkhet, Nepal.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms.acceptance.desc: By accessing and using Mero Restaurant's website and mobile application, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.orders.title: Orders and Payment
terms.orders.1: All prices are listed in Nepalese Rupees (NPR)
terms.orders.2: Prices may change without prior notice
terms.orders.3: We accept payments via Khalti, eSewa, Fonepay, and cash
terms.orders.4: Orders are confirmed only after successful payment processing
terms.delivery.title: Delivery
terms.delivery.desc: Delivery is available within Birendranagar, Surkhet. Delivery times are estimates and may vary based on order volume and conditions.
terms.cancellation.title: Cancellations and Refunds
terms.cancellation.desc: Orders may be cancelled within 5 minutes of placement. Refunds for cancelled orders will be processed within 3-5 business days to the original payment method.
terms.wifi.title: WiFi Terms of Use
terms.wifi.desc: Our complimentary WiFi service is provided for customer use during dining. Usage is subject to fair-use policies. Illegal activities are strictly prohibited.
terms.contact.title: Contact
terms.contact.desc: Questions about these terms? Contact us at
